activities_projects.title: Describe Toto’s Appearance
activities_projects.objective: Understand the physical description of Toto
steps: Read the paragraph describing Toto
Write 5–6 sentences describing Toto’s appearance

activities_projects.title: Grandmother’s Reaction
steps: Identify parts where Grandmother reacts to animals
Write 4–5 sentences explaining her reaction

activities_projects.title: Toto in the Closet
activities_projects.objective: Understand the first mischievous act of Toto
steps: Read the incident where Toto was kept in the closet
Explain what damage Toto caused in 5 sentences

activities_projects.title: Animals in Grandfather’s Zoo
activities_projects.objective: Identify animals mentioned in the story
steps: Find animals mentioned in the story
List them and write one line about each

activities_projects.title: Ticket Collector Incident
steps: Read the train journey part
Explain why the ticket collector called Toto a dog

activities_projects.title: Toto and Nana
steps: Read the section about Nana
Explain the relationship between Toto and Nana in 4–5 sentences

activities_projects.title: Toto’s Bath Habit
steps: Read the part about Toto’s bath
Explain how Toto learned to bathe like humans

activities_projects.title: Kitchen Kettle Incident
activities_projects.objective: Understand the dangerous situation Toto created
steps: Read the kettle incident carefully
Write 5 sentences explaining what happened

activities_projects.title: Lunch-Time Mischief
activities_projects.objective: Understand Toto’s behaviour at the dining table
steps: Read the lunch scene
Describe Toto’s actions in 4–5 sentences

activities_projects.title: Title Meaning
activities_projects.objective: Understand why the story is titled 'The Adventures of Toto'
steps: Think about the events in the story
Write 5 sentences explaining the title
